name: Train Car Interior - High Detail
prompt: Photorealistic, high-detail interior of an Eastern European long-distance passenger train (late 1980s). Detailed wood, scratched metal, peeling patterned wallpaper, oil stains and grime in crevices. Provide high-poly sculpt for baking, retopologized game mesh for mobile (LOD0 ~ 12-20k tris, LOD1 ~ 5-8k, LOD2 ~ 2-3k). PBR textures: albedo/normal/roughness/metal/AO as PNG. Export glTF 2.0 (.glb), Y-up, meters. Include separate collision mesh named 'interior_car_collider'.

name: Erich - Leader
prompt: Realistic male character, ~40, charismatic but hardened. 1980s clothing, dirt and wear. Provide high-poly sculpt and retopology. Mobile LODs: LOD0 12-15k, LOD1 6-8k, LOD2 2-3k. PBR textures 2048 (face/cloth), skin maps, eye textures. Provide animations: idle_breathing, talk_gesture, give_item, panic_run. Skinning and animations exported in .glb.

name: Flask (metal)
prompt: Detailed metal flask, dented and stained, realistic material detail. Single mesh, mobile tris <= 1500, PBR textures 1024. Export .glb with pivot at cap.

name: Rails - wheel knock loop
prompt: Loopable ambient recording - rhythmic wheel knock on rails with subtle body resonance, suitable for mobile and low bitrate. Provide .ogg 44.1kHz loopable file and .wav master.
